title: cerastium formosanum
intro: Cerastium formosanum, also known as the Formosa chickweed, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cerastium formosanum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially helping to alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. In herbal preparations, Cerastium formosanum is often made into teas, infusions, or applied topically as a poultice or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
